entry.title: New: CR 25-62 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 114 (2025), to clarify that vacant Hawaiian Home Lands are exempt from real property taxation, including the minimum tax, except that improvements on the leased property are subject to the minimum tax beginning in the lease’s eighth year.

Special Committee on Real Property Tax Reform

View on the council site
